testcase.name: shouldFindByType
testcase.system-out: Hibernate: insert into transactions (amount, category, created_at, description, type, updated_at, id) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?) Hibernate: insert into transactions (amount, category, created_at, description, type, updated_at, id) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?) Hibernate: insert into transactions (amount, category, created_at, description, type, updated_at, id) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?) Hibernate: select t1_0.id, t1_0.amount, t1_0.category, t1_0.created_at, t1_0.description, t1_0.type, t1_0.updated_at from transactions t1_0 where t1_0.type=? order by t1_0.created_at desc Hibernate: select t1_0.id, t1_0.amount, t1_0.category, t1_0.created_at, t1_0.description, t1_0.type, t1_0.updated_at from transactions t1_0 where t1_0.type=? order by t1_0.created_at desc

Hibernate: select coalesce(sum(t1_0.amount), 0) from transactions t1_0 where t1_0.type=? and t1_0.created_at>=? and t1_0.created_at<?

testcase.name: shouldGetExpensesByCategory
testcase.system-out: Hibernate: insert into transactions (amount, category, created_at, description, type, updated_at, id) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?) Hibernate: insert into transactions (amount, category, created_at, description, type, updated_at, id) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?) Hibernate: insert into transactions (amount, category, created_at, description, type, updated_at, id) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?) Hibernate: select t1_0.category, sum(t1_0.amount) from transactions t1_0 where t1_0.type='EXPENSE' and t1_0.created_at>=? and t1_0.created_at<? group by t1_0.category order by 2 desc

testcase.name: shouldSearchByDescription
testcase.system-out: Hibernate: insert into transactions (amount, category, created_at, description, type, updated_at, id) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?) Hibernate: insert into transactions (amount, category, created_at, description, type, updated_at, id) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?) Hibernate: insert into transactions (amount, category, created_at, description, type, updated_at, id) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?) Hibernate: select t1_0.id, t1_0.amount, t1_0.category, t1_0.created_at, t1_0.description, t1_0.type, t1_0.updated_at from transactions t1_0 where upper(t1_0.description) like upper(?) escape '\' order by t1_0.created_at desc

testcase.name: shouldFindByCategory
testcase.system-out: Hibernate: insert into transactions (amount, category, created_at, description, type, updated_at, id) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?) testcase.name: shouldDeleteTransaction

Hibernate: select t1_0.id, t1_0.amount, t1_0.category, t1_0.created_at, t1_0.description, t1_0.type, t1_0.updated_at from transactions t1_0 Hibernate: delete from transactions where id=? Hibernate: select t1_0.id, t1_0.amount, t1_0.category, t1_0.created_at, t1_0.description, t1_0.type, t1_0.updated_at from transactions t1_0

testcase.name: shouldCalculateBalance
testcase.system-out: Hibernate: insert into transactions (amount, category, created_at, description, type, updated_at, id) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?) Hibernate: insert into transactions (amount, category, created_at, description, type, updated_at, id) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?) Hibernate: insert into transactions (amount, category, created_at, description, type, updated_at, id) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?) Hibernate: select sum(case when t1_0.type='INCOME' then t1_0.amount else -t1_0.amount end) from transactions t1_0

testcase.name: shouldGetBalanceSince
testcase.system-out: Hibernate: insert into transactions (amount, category, created_at, description, type, updated_at, id) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?) Hibernate: insert into transactions (amount, category, created_at, description, type, updated_at, id) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?) Hibernate: select sum(case when t1_0.type='INCOME' then t1_0.amount else -t1_0.amount end) from transactions t1_0 where t1_0.created_at>=?
